company_name: 西安高新控股有限公司
official_exit_event: Issuer disclosures state that the company exited the financing-platform list in 2012 and bank loans became ordinary issuer loans.
final_rationale: Official exit is documented but the company continued to serve as an important infrastructure investment construction and entrusted-construction body for Xi'an High-tech Zone after exit; bond and rating materials describe BT or entrusted-construction arrangements government repurchase/project payments and continuing infrastructure financing pressure.
ambiguity_note: Some business modules were transferred after 2019 but the available evidence still shows the same issuer retaining core infrastructure construction and financing-related functions rather than a clean transfer of the whole quasi-fiscal role.
caveat: Exit event is supported by issuer disclosures across 2020 and 2026 rather than by a directly retrieved government exit-list document.
notes: Use as first human-validated pilot label; keep searching for the 2012 government exit-list document before treating the exit event as directly government-confirmed.

company_name: 广州市城市建设投资集团有限公司
official_exit_event: Issuer and rating disclosures state that since 2014 the company no longer participated in new government-project investment-financing and shifted to fiscal-funded entrusted project management.
final_rationale: The company moved away from new government-project investment-financing toward budget-funded project management; old and current disclosures both state the post-2014 entrusted-management model and the 2018 announcement shows part of the 2014 MTN being recognized as government-repayment-responsibility debt and included in the fiscal budget for replacement.
ambiguity_note: The company still performs public infrastructure and project-management functions and holds large public-welfare assets so the label depends on distinguishing budgetary project management from off-budget government financing.
caveat: This is a fiscal-substitution case rather than an exit-list case; final confidence should be raised only after collecting the original Guangzhou 2008 reform document or additional 2014 issuance materials.
notes: Use as second human-validated pilot label and contrast case against Xi'an Hi-tech.
